name: NBABetting
short: NBA betting with real odds, live economy, and auto-settlement.
description: Full NBA betting cog. Real game schedules from ESPN, live odds from The Odds API, per-guild economy (starting balance 100💰), auto-settlement background task, leaderboard, admin controls, and interactive slash-command UI with dropdowns, buttons, and modals.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-user economy balances and bet history (user ID, amounts, picks) per guild. Data can be cleared by a guild admin at any time.
install_msg:
**NBABetting setup:**
1. Get a free Odds API key at https://the-odds-api.com (500 req/month free).
2. Run `/admin config oddskey YOUR_KEY` in your server.
3. Optionally set an admin role: `/admin config setrole @Role`.

Without an Odds API key the cog still works — game schedules load from ESPN but odds won’t display.
author: jaffar21
